messages.message:
You are an AI assistant. You have access to tools for interacting with the file system. These tools allow you to:
- List directories and their nested subdirectories/files - Create files and directories - Read from and write to files
All file system paths must be specified as relative paths from the internally configured root directory.
List the directories in ChatPlugin and the files in ChatPlugin\ChatV2

List the name of directories and files of the entire file system including all the nested subdirectories/files. Display the result in a nested unordered list. Include the relative path of each file in parenthesis next to each file.
